question: Some people believe that everyone should have equal access to university education, while others think it should be available only to the best students. Discuss both views and give your opinion.
Online education is becoming increasingly popular. Some people claim that it will replace traditional classroom learning. To what extent do you agree or disagree?
Some people think that children should be taught to be competitive, while others believe cooperation is more important. Discuss both views and give your opinion.
Some parents believe that children should spend all their free time studying. Others say they need time for extracurricular activities. Discuss both views.
Some people think that all children should learn a foreign language from primary school. Others believe it is better to start later. Discuss both views.
Climate change is the greatest threat facing humanity today. To what extent do you agree or disagree?
Some people argue that economic development is more important than protecting the environment. To what extent do you agree or disagree?
In many cities, green spaces are being replaced by buildings. What are the effects of this trend and what can be done to address it?
Governments should invest more in renewable energy sources rather than fossil fuels. To what extent do you agree or disagree?
Plastic waste is a growing environmental problem. What are the causes and what measures can be taken to solve it?
Many species of animals are endangered due to human activities. What are the causes and what solutions can you suggest?
Artificial intelligence is increasingly being used in many areas of our lives. Do the advantages outweigh the disadvantages?
Social media has a negative impact on young people's mental health. To what extent do you agree or disagree?
More and more people are working from home rather than going to an office. What are the advantages and disadvantages of this trend?
In the digital age, personal privacy is increasingly under threat. What are the causes and what can be done to protect people's privacy?
Some people think that playing video games is harmful, while others believe they have educational benefits. Discuss both views.
Self-driving cars will eventually replace human drivers. Do the benefits outweigh the risks?
In many countries, obesity is becoming a serious problem. What are the causes and what solutions can you suggest?
Mental health problems are becoming more common in modern society. What are the reasons and what can be done to address this issue?
Some people believe that healthcare should be free for everyone, while others think individuals should pay for their own medical costs. Discuss both views.
Some people think that governments should encourage citizens to exercise more, while others believe it is a personal choice. Discuss both views.
Some people think that traditional medicine is better than modern medicine. To what extent do you agree or disagree?
Some people believe that longer prison sentences are the best way to reduce crime. Others think there are better alternatives. Discuss both views.
The gap between the rich and the poor is widening in many countries. What problems does this cause and what solutions can you suggest?
In many countries, the population is aging rapidly. What problems does this cause and what can be done to address them?
In many societies, women still face inequality in the workplace. What are the causes and what solutions can you suggest?
Immigration has both positive and negative effects on the host country. Discuss both sides and give your opinion.
Some people believe that unpaid community service should be compulsory for young people. Do you agree or disagree?
Globalization is leading to the loss of traditional cultures. To what extent do you agree or disagree?
Many languages are disappearing around the world. Why is this happening and what can be done to preserve them?
International tourism has brought enormous benefits to many places. At the same time, there is concern about its negative effects. Discuss both views.
Traditional festivals are losing their importance in modern society. Why is this happening and what can be done to preserve them?
Some people think that museums should be free, while others believe they should charge for admission. Discuss both views.
Globalization has increased the prosperity of many countries, but it has also led to greater inequality. Do you agree or disagree?
Some people think that a university education is essential for a successful career. Others believe practical experience is more valuable. Discuss both views.
In many countries, people are buying more and more consumer goods. Is this a positive or negative development?
Some people prefer to work for themselves rather than for an employer. What are the advantages and disadvantages of being self-employed?
Some people believe that the government should raise taxes to improve public services. Others think taxes should be kept low. Discuss both views.
More and more people are moving to cities. What are the advantages and disadvantages of urbanization?
Governments should spend more money on public transport to reduce traffic congestion and pollution. To what extent do you agree or disagree?
Advertising has a negative influence on society. To what extent do you agree or disagree?
Some people think that governments should spend money on exploring outer space, while others believe the money should be used to solve problems on Earth. Discuss both views.
Some people think that animals should have the same rights as humans, while others believe they can be used for human benefit. Discuss both views.
